channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Mainframe Modernization Gets a Boost from Generative AI - IBM's Big Iron Refresh and Startup Mechanical Orchard Unveil Imogen Service
item.description: Mainframe modernization gets a boost from generative AI as IBM prepares its next mainframe refresh, and startup Mechanical Orchard unveils its Imogen service to help customers move legacy workloads into the cloud.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest

item.title: Python Web Framework Python Unveils Latest Update with Enhanced Features
item.description: The latest version of the Python web framework Django has been unveiled by the Django Software Foundation, featuring an automatic model-importing capability and more.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
